name: Hush Puppies
recipeIngredient: Oil or Shortening for Deep Fat Frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the beaten egg, buttermilk or sour milk, and sliced green onions in a separate bowl.
2. In another bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Gradually add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
4. Heat oil or shortening in a deep fryer or heavy-duty saucepan to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil. Fry about 1 minute or until golden brown, turning once.
6. Drain on paper towels.
Yield: 14 to 18
